reason: The previous best result used weighted BCE and specaugment. To explore new generalization paths, I am keeping the weighted_bce loss (critical for class imbalance) but changing the augmentation to background_mix, which introduces environmental noise regularization. I am increasing the initial learning rate to 1e-3 (the standard rate) and pairing it with the exp_decay schedule, which provides a different, more aggressive decay profile than the cosine decay used previously. This combination aims to maintain the strong performance foundation while testing different regularization and decay dynamics.
